overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist exploring a historic Middle Eastern palace complex. The character moves through interconnected stone courtyards, gardens with water features, and shaded walkways with Islamic architectural elements including arches, geometric tilework, and central fountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with central pool and stone arcade

events.description: exits covered stone archway into sunlit palace courtyard
turns slightly right to follow path along pool edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through stone archway into courtyard, approaching central pool with fountain

notable_agents.action: child playing in the shallow pool water near the fountain
person sitting on rug by pool edge, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large stone archway framing the entrance to the courtyard
two-story stone building with arched openings and decorative balconies
rectangular water pool with tiled edges and central fountain structure
tall stone wall covered in green climbing vines and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a stone archway looking out into a sunlit palace courtyard. The character walks forward along a cobblestone path, passing an ivy-covered wall on the left, approaching a central pool where a child plays in the water and a person sits on the edge. The historic stone palace facade rises ahead with arched openings and balconies.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with water channels and garden

events.description: enters shaded covered walkway with twisted stone columns from open courtyard
turns left to navigate around garden fountain in water channel area

agents.ego_description: moving through shaded corridor with twisted columns, following path alongside water channels

entered.detail: ornately carved spiral stone columns supporting archway structures
narrow water channel running parallel to the walkway with stone edges
octagonal stone fountain with water jets in garden area
decorative wooden lattice work on wall allowing light through

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open courtyard into a shaded, covered walkway defined by twisted stone columns. The environment features intricate tilework underfoot, water channels running alongside the path, and potted blue flowers. The lighting becomes softer and more diffused as the character proceeds toward another garden fountain before approaching the exit archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: large open palace courtyard with central fountain and palm trees

events.description: exits covered walkway into large open courtyard with palm trees and domed buildings
circles around large central fountain while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through expansive sunlit courtyard, circling central fountain with green tiled base

notable_agents.action: person in brown robes walking near fountain base
person carrying basket walking across courtyard path

entered.detail: large octagonal fountain with green tiled sides and multiple water jets
tall stone tower with dome roof and arched windows in background
tall palm trees lining the edges of the courtyard
trimmed boxwood hedges bordering the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shaded walkway, the scene opens into a grand sunlit palace courtyard dominated by a large central fountain with green tiles. Palm trees line the perimeter and a domed tower rises in the background. The character circles the fountain while passing other pedestrians, with well-manicured hedges and stone benches visible along the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded garden path with sitting areas

events.description: passes through archway into final garden area with grass lawns
slight turn to avoid stone bench while following garden path

agents.ego_description: walking along stone path through garden, passing people resting on grass in shade

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on grass in shade of trees

entered.detail: stone archway marking entrance to final garden section
grassy area with people sitting, bordered by low stone walls
stone seating benches along the left side of the path
mature olive trees providing dappled shade over the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a final stone archway into a quieter garden area with dappled sunlight filtering through olive trees. The path runs between stone benches on the left and a grassy lawn on the right where people sit in the shade. The atmosphere is more intimate and enclosed compared to the previous open courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of interconnected palace spaces, transitioning from bright open courtyards into shaded corridors and finally into an intimate garden. It begins under a stone archway, moving along a cobblestone path past ivy-covered walls toward a central pool and a historic palace facade. As the character leaves the sunlight, the scene shifts into a covered walkway defined by twisted stone columns, intricate tilework, and soft, diffused lighting. The environment then opens back up into a grand, sun-drenched courtyard dominated by a large green-tiled fountain and a distant domed tower. Finally, the camera passes through one last archway into a quiet garden where dappled sunlight filters through olive trees and people rest on grassy lawns.
